appDesc.message: Instantly highlight keywords on any website. Customize colors, use presets, and mark important info with a right-click.

deleteGroupConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete group "%s" and all its keywords?

milestone_5_text.message: You've added 5 keywords! Is Hilight Lens helping you?

milestone_15_text.message: 15 keywords reached! Consider supporting the developer.

milestone_30_text.message: You've managed 30 keywords! Has Hilight Lens made reading easier?

milestone_100_text.message: Wow! 100 keywords! You're a Hilight Lens super user!

importConfirm.message: Importing will overwrite all existing keywords and groups. Are you sure you want to continue?

importError.message: Import failed. Please make sure the file format is correct. You can try exporting first to see the expected format.

exportHeader.message:
# Hilight Lens Keyword Data Export
# Format: Keyword | BackgroundColor | TextColor | Enabled | GroupName
# You can manually edit this file. Each line represents one keyword.
# Lines starting with # are comments.
